mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.user_id AS userId, u.nick_name AS userName, u.icon AS userIcon, p.post_title AS postTitle, p.post_content AS postContent, p.update_time AS updateTime, COALESCE(like_data.number, 0) AS likeCount, COALESCE(view_data.number, 0) AS viewCount, COALESCE(share_data.number, 0) AS shareCount, 0 AS commentCount, IF(ul.id IS NOT NULL, TRUE, FALSE) AS isLiked FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, number FROM post_data WHERE status = '01' AND is_deleted = 0 ) like_data ON p.id = like_data.post_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, number FROM post_data WHERE status = '02' AND is_deleted = 0 ) view_data ON p.id = view_data.post_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT post_id, number FROM post_data WHERE status = '03' AND is_deleted = 0 ) share_data ON p.id = share_data.post_id LEFT JOIN user_like ul ON ul.post_id = p.id AND ul.user_id = #{currentUserId} WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY p.update_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (user_id, post_title, post_content, creat_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO post_data (post_id, status, number) VALUES (#{postId}, '01', 0), (#{postId}, '02', 0), (#{postId}, '03', 0)
mapper.select: SELECT number FROM post_data WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = #{status} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_like WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
